feat.name: Palatine Enchantment
feat.text: You have found yourself facing supernatural beings often and have learned how to combat them. Whenever you Devise a Stratagem against a creature about which you could Recall Knowledge using Occultism or Religion, you can make the subsequent Strike against that creature as if the weapon has either a ghost touch or vitalizing property rune.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
